title: All Aboard!
overview: Kids across the city get strange messages on their electronic devices. These messages ask them if they're ready for their future. What do these messages mean?

title: Lobomon: Warrior of Light
overview: With one spirit down, the others prepare for their destiny's, but how does one spirit evolve? Does this mean all the kids will become legendary warriors? And how does spirit evolution work?

title: Kumamon Baby, Light My Fire
overview: Tomoki wants to learn to spirit evolve, but to get a spirit, he must get through a Candmon village. Can Agnimon help save the day?

title: Kazemon Kicks It
overview: Zoe, JP, Tommy, and Takuya reach a spliting point on the Trailmon tracks. When Takuya and Tommy go one way, it's up to JP and Zoe to save a bunch of Floramon. Can they do so when neither of them has a spirit?

title: Ladies and Gentlemen: The Beetlemon
overview: The new digidestined must help a village of Digimon to get free from the Goblimon and Snimon, but can they do so when JP doesn't have a spirit?

title: A Molehill Out of a Mountain
overview: The KarautsukiNumemon look for help for their village because legendary warriors have taken their womon and childmon hostage, but when they find out the gang is legendary warriors trouble is the result. What exactly is a Beast Spirit, and why is their now a slide evolution? The answers can be found.

title: Island of Misfit Boys
overview: Takuya's and Koji's differences cause a lot of arguements, but when Tommy gets captured, can they put aside their differences and save him?

title: Odd One Out
overview: JP and Zoe arrive at a digimon school where one digimon, Tsunomon, is constantly being ignored. Can the two of them convience the other kids that digivolution isn't a bad thing?

title: Welcome to My Nightmare
overview: Tommy is tricked by a Bakumon causing his dreams to all be evil and make his friends appear evil. Can the digi-destined find a way to save him?

title: Can't Keep a Grumblemon Down
overview: The digi-destined figure out that you need a Beast Spirit to defeat a Beast Spirit, but can they find there Beast Spirits before Grumblemon steals all of their spirits?

title: A Hunka Hunka BurningGreymon
overview: When Grottemon isolates koji, the others must find a way to defeat his Beast Spirit. Can Shamamon help them out when he's possessed?

title: Fear and Loathing in Los Arboles
overview: Takuya gains control over his beast spirit, but can he maintain that control when he's forced into a one-on-one battle with Grumblemon?

title: Better an Egg than an Egg Shell
overview: 4 of the 5 Dark Warriors decide to attack the digi-destined on a quest to gain their spirits. Can a little help from Sorcermon and Seraphimon help them to free the digital world?

title: No Whamon
overview: Grumblemon returns to regain his beast spirit and seperates Takuya and Koji from the rest of the group, but when JP gains his beast spirit can he master it enough to finish off Grumblemon for good?

title: Beastie Girl
overview: When the gang decodes to go on a water vacation, the Toucanmon steal the boys D-tectors. Can Zoe save the day without her beast spirit?

title: The Swiss Family Digimon
overview: A group of Gomamon want to gain access to their island, but it's surronded by whirlpools and Zephrymon guards the way. Can the digi-destined find a way to save the world when the boys still don't have their D-tectors?

title: Bizarre Bazaar
overview: Tommy finds the boys D-Tectors at the county fair, but he doesn't have anything to trade to get them back. Can he find something to trade to get them back before the Dark Legendary Warriors show up?

title: Trailmon vs. Trailmon
overview: The digi-destined stop their battles briefly to participate in the Trailmon races, but can they find a way to stop the normal cheating that occurs?

title: You Want Fries with That?
overview: The kids need some food, so they head to the Burgermon village. What will happen when they run into the master of wood?

title: From Dawn to Duskmon
overview: Arbormon wants revenge for his missing burgers, so he follows the kids into The Continent of Darkness, but what else has followed there?

title: Darkest Before Duskmon
overview: When Duskmon proves to be too strong for the digi-destined, they have a new decision to make. What will it be?

title: Home Again, Takuya Returns
overview: Takuya decides to head home on a Dark Trailmon, but when he gets stuck as a Digimon in the real world, what will he do?

title: Sockit Takuya
overview: Takuya returns to the digital world as a stronger Agunimon, but can he save his friends in a classic 2-on-1 showdown?

title: Alone but Never Alone
overview: When the kids get sucked inside Sakkakumon, they must defeat their opponents and their own self doubts to get free, but will they succeed?

title: The Dark Heart of Friendship
overview: Tommy gets a group of digimon in his dimension who pretend to be his friend, but can he figure out the truth before they steal his D-Tector?

title: Zoe's Unbeelievable Adventure
overview: The fight between Ranamon and Zoe reaches its exciting finale, but who will come out the victor?

title: Stuck in Sakkakumon with You
overview: Koji must battle Duskmon one on one, but will he be able to succeed when they couldn't defeat Duskmon as a team?

title: Darkness Before the Dawn
overview: To get out of Sakkakumon, Takuya must find a way to defeat Mercurymon. Can he find a way to achieve Fusion Evolution and succeed, or are the digi-destined done for in this battle?

title: Phantasmagoric Sakkakumon
overview: Sakkakumon reveals he is still alive, and now he has the digi-destined's attacks. Can they find a way to create new attacks and defeat Sakkakumon once and for all?

title: O, Brother, Who Art Thou?
overview: Koji and Kouichi begin to figure out they're related some how, but what is that relation, and can it stop the two of them from destroying each other?

title: Workin' on the Train Gang
overview: JP, Zoe, and Tommy decide to discover what horrors await them at the Rose Morning Star by searching a Trailmon graveyard, but what horrors await them inside the graveyard?

title: My Brother in Spirit
overview: When Koji realizes he has a brother and has been fighting him, he refuses to fight anymore. Can Takuya make him see the truth?

title: Ne'er the Twins Shall Meet
overview: Now that he's a regular human again, Kouichi decides to join the digi-destined, but can he find a way to help them out without any spirits of his own to use?

title: Operation: Free Ophanimon
overview: The digidestined decide to free Ophanimon once and for all, but Cherubimon ends up being her guard. Can they find a way to free her from the final of the 3 guardian Digimon?

title: Takuya and Koji's Evolution Revolution
overview: Takuya and Koji must hold off Cherubimon while the others free Ophanimon, but can they succeed when they lose their spirits?

title: Ice Ice Baby
overview: Cherubimon appears to be defeated, but he appears to be easy compared to IceDevimon. Can the others find a way to defeat IceDevimon with Takuya and Koji's D-Tectors frozen solid?

title: Cherubimania
overview: The final battle between EmperorGreymon/ MagnaGarurumon and Cherubimon begins, but who will end up being the victor, and who are these mysterious characters that are watching the battle?

title: It Can't Be! Lucemon Reappears
overview: The Royal Knights appears and reveal that Lucemon will return. Can the digi-destined find a way to prevent this chaos from occuring,or will they be delaying the inevitable?

title: The Man in the Moon is You
overview: After waking up on the moon, the digi-destined decide to try to get back to the digital world to get revenge on the Royal Knights, but will they succeed, or will they be stuck on the moon for the rest of their lives?

title: The Bully Pulpit
overview: The digidestined run into the same group of kids that pusked Tommy onto the train causing him to come into the digital world, but can Tommy get past his resentment of them and save the day?

title: Jerks and the Beanstalk
overview: Katshuhara and company have been captured by the Royal Knights. It's a good thing for them that Tommy is with them, but can they find a way to save Beanstalk Village, and can the other kids get Worm the Trailmon to want to help out?

title: Glean Eggs and Scram
overview: When the Royal Knights target the Village og Beginnings for their next assault, it's up to the kids to convience the Trailmon to save the digi-eggs, but can they finally defeat the Royal Knights? Maybe they can with help from some old enemies.

title: Bad to the Bones
overview: The kids rush to try and save the Flame Terminal from being deleted, but with the SkullSatamon already on hand, can they find a way to defeat them? Is there any way to unite all the Digimon to fight together?

title: Now You See It, Now You Don't
overview: With only 3 areas left to protect in the digital world, the digi-destined must act fast to save the forest terminal. EmperorGreymon and MagnaGarurumon seem to be getting stronger, but will they finally be able to defeat the Royal Knights?

title: All Aboard the Tag Team Express
overview: Only 2 areas of the digital world remain: The Autumn Leaf Fair and Ophanimon's castle, but can the kids find a way to save The Fair without losing any more digimon friends, or is the digital world truly done for?

title: To Make the World Go Away
overview: The digi-destined arrive at Ophanimon's castle to try and save the last bit of data from being given to Lucemon. Can they finally defeat the Royal Knights, or will Lucemon be reborn?

title: When Knights Fall...
overview: The final battle with the Royal Knights is about to occur, but who will win this surprising bout?

title: The Brothers Yin and Yang
overview: Since Emperor Greymon and MagnaGarurumon proved to be too weak, the kids decide to try a multi attack, but will it be enough, or will they need additional power?

title: Lucemon on the Loose
overview: Susannomon has been born, but will the combined powers of all 10 legendary spirits be enough to defeat Lucemon for good, or does Lucemon have one final surprise in store?

title: End of the Line
overview: The final battle between Lucemon and Susanoomon will be decided not in the digital world, but in the real world. Who will end up prevailing in this free for all?
